answer_en:
Uterine Tube**
(Oviduct; Fallopian Tube)
**Spillage of dye at the fimbriae indicates that both uterine tubes are patent (open).

labels.text: **Spillage of dye at the fimbriae indicates that both uterine tubes are patent (open).
